titleZh: AI 日报｜Simon Willison、MarkTechPost都在把 AI 往真实工作流里送
titleEn: AI Daily | Where AI starts to look more like infrastructure than demo
excerptZh: 今天这期更像两条线同时加速：一条是 Agent 与开发者工具，另一条是 检索、多模态与记忆系统。Simon Willison、MarkTechPost 分别从研究、产品和工具三侧往前拱…
excerptEn: This issue is really about two lines accelerating at once: Agents and developer tooling, and Retrieval, multimodal, and memory systems. Simon Willison…
issueSummaryZh: 今天这期更像两条线同时加速：一条是 Agent 与开发者工具，另一条是 检索、多模态与记忆系统。Simon Willison、MarkTechPost 分别从研究、产品和工具三侧往前拱，读完会更容易看清当下 AI 行业的重心并不在“新功能数量”，而在“能力能不能真正接进现实流程”。
issueSummaryEn: This issue is really about two lines accelerating at once: Agents and developer tooling, and Retrieval, multimodal, and memory systems. Simon Willison, MarkTechPost are pushing from different angles, but the shared point is hard to miss: the market is caring less about isolated model demos and more about whether capability can survive contact with real workflows.

featuredItems.titleZh: Simon Willison｜Agent 与开发者工具
featuredItems.summaryZh: Simon Willison放出了一项围绕Agent 工作流与开发工具的研究型更新，指向的是把模型能力变成可编排的执行链路。 Simon Willison想证明的不是模型更聪明，而是 agent 终于更像能进生产环境的工具…
featuredItems.summaryEn: Simon Willison published a research-led update around agent workflows and developer tooling, aimed at turning model capability into orchestrated execution workflows… The clearest public signal so far is this…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 行业竞争点正在从“聊天回答得好不好”转向“能不能稳定接进软件、工具链和自动化流程”，这决定了真正的生产力入口。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: The competition is moving from chat quality to whether models can sit inside software, tooling, and automation without breaking the workflow around them.

featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: The competition is moving from chat quality to whether models can sit inside software, tooling, and automation without breaking the workflow around them.

featuredItems.titleZh: MarkTechPost｜检索、多模态与记忆系统
featuredItems.titleEn: Meet OpenViking: An Open-Source Context Database that Brings Filesystem-Based Memory and Retrieval to AI Agent Systems like OpenClaw
featuredItems.summaryZh: MarkTechPost把围绕检索、记忆的东西真正放了出来，重点不只是“开源”两个字，而是让外部生态更容易复用、验证和接着往下搭。看上去像底层升级，但最后影响的还是搜索、知识库和多模态产品的手感…
featuredItems.summaryEn: MarkTechPost opened up work around retrieval and memory, making it easier for the wider ecosystem to inspect, reuse, and build on. This looks like infrastructure, but it usually decides how good search…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 这类底层能力决定搜索、推荐、知识库和多模态检索系统的可用性，很多 AI 产品体验的上限取决于这里。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: These lower-layer changes set the ceiling for search, recommendation, knowledge systems, and cross-modal retrieval. A lot of product quality is decided here.

titleZh: AI 日报｜Hugging Face、Simon Willison都在把 AI 往真实工作流里送

excerptZh: 今天这期更像两条线同时加速：一条是 前沿研究与能力边界，另一条是 检索、多模态与记忆系统。Hugging Face、Simon Willison、MarkTechPost 分别从研究、产品和工具三侧往前拱…
excerptEn: This issue is really about two lines accelerating at once: Frontier research and capability shifts, and Retrieval, multimodal, and memory systems. Hugging Face, Simon Willison…
issueSummaryZh: 今天这期更像两条线同时加速：一条是 前沿研究与能力边界，另一条是 检索、多模态与记忆系统。Hugging Face、Simon Willison、MarkTechPost 分别从研究、产品和工具三侧往前拱，读完会更容易看清当下 AI 行业的重心并不在“新功能数量”，而在“能力能不能真正接进现实流程”。
issueSummaryEn: This issue is really about two lines accelerating at once: Frontier research and capability shifts, and Retrieval, multimodal, and memory systems. Hugging Face, Simon Willison, MarkTechPost are pushing from different angles, but the shared point is hard to miss: the market is caring less about isolated model demos and more about whether capability can survive contact with real workflows.
heroTitleZh: Hugging Face｜检索、多模态与记忆系统
heroTitleEn: Beyond Semantic Similarity: Introducing NVIDIA NeMo Retriever’s Generalizable Agentic Retrieval Pipeline

themes.themeZh: 检索、多模态与记忆系统

featuredItems.titleZh: Hugging Face｜检索、多模态与记忆系统
featuredItems.titleEn: Beyond Semantic Similarity: Introducing NVIDIA NeMo Retriever’s Generalizable Agentic Retrieval Pipeline
featuredItems.summaryZh: Hugging Face把嵌入模型、Agent 工作流继续往产品和开发者工作流里压，重点已经不是演示能力，而是提升非结构化信息进入同一检索空间的能力。看上去像底层升级，但最后影响的还是搜索、知识库和多模态产品的手感。 文中最值得记的一处细节是：In contrast…
featuredItems.summaryEn: Hugging Face moved embedding model and agentic workflows deeper into product and developer workflows, which is really about bringing more unstructured data into the same retrieval space…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 这类底层能力决定搜索、推荐、知识库和多模态检索系统的可用性，很多 AI 产品体验的上限取决于这里。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: These lower-layer changes set the ceiling for search, recommendation, knowledge systems, and cross-modal retrieval. A lot of product quality is decided here.

featuredItems.titleEn: 1M context is now generally available for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6
featuredItems.summaryZh: Simon Willison把产品体验升级和更明确的产品化动作绑在一起，说明这件事正在往业务入口靠近。重点不是功能又多了一项，而是 AI 是否更深地嵌进用户日常动作…
featuredItems.summaryEn: Simon Willison tied product experience upgrades to a more explicit product push, suggesting the story is moving closer to distribution and adoption…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 当能力真正进入用户日常动作时，竞争会从模型分数转向使用深度、留存、交互设计和默认入口。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: Once capability lands inside everyday behavior, the real contest shifts to usage depth, habit formation, interaction design, and default entry points.

featuredItems.titleEn: Google DeepMind Introduces Aletheia: The AI Agent Moving from Math Competitions to Fully Autonomous Professional Research Discoveries
featuredItems.summaryZh: Google放出了一项围绕研究前沿的研究型更新，指向的是推动能力边界继续外扩。这条消息值得看，不只是因为它新，而是因为它把最近这波行业主线又往前推了一截。 目前能确认的公开信号是：Google DeepMind team has introduced Aletheia…
featuredItems.summaryEn: Google published a research-led update around research frontier, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward. What makes this worth following is that it pushes the broader industry arc a little further forward…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 研究型更新不一定会马上产品化，但它能提示下一阶段能力边界正在往哪边移动。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: Research updates do not always become products quickly, but they often tell you where the capability frontier is starting to bend.

excerptEn: This issue is really about two lines accelerating at once: Agents and developer tooling, and Data and evaluation infrastructure. Hugging Face, Google, GitHub…
issueSummaryZh: 今天这期更像两条线同时加速：一条是 Agent 与开发者工具，另一条是 数据与评测基础设施。Hugging Face、Google、GitHub、Simon Willison 分别从研究、产品和工具三侧往前拱，读完会更容易看清当下 AI 行业的重心并不在“新功能数量”，而在“能力能不能真正接进现实流程”。

featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: Data supply and evaluation standards shape the ceiling of models, and they also redefine how teams compare progress and choose directions.

titleZh: 2026-03-11 AI 日报：OpenAI公布指令层级、提示注入
excerptZh: 这期只保留近 24 小时里最值得继续跟进的 6 条 AI 更新，主线集中在 AI 产品体验、检索、多模态与记忆系统、模型安全与可控性。其中 2 条补抓了原文正文，所以解释不只停留在 RSS 片段。
excerptEn: This issue keeps only the 6 highest-signal AI updates from the last 24 hours, concentrated around AI product experience, Retrieval, multimodal, and memory systems, Model safety and controllability. 2 of them include fetched full article bodies, so the commentary goes beyond RSS snippets.
issueSummaryZh: 这期只保留近 24 小时里最值得继续跟进的 6 条 AI 更新，主线集中在 AI 产品体验、检索、多模态与记忆系统、模型安全与可控性。其中 2 条补抓了原文正文，所以解释不只停留在 RSS 片段。
issueSummaryEn: This issue keeps only the 6 highest-signal AI updates from the last 24 hours, concentrated around AI product experience, Retrieval, multimodal, and memory systems, Model safety and controllability. 2 of them include fetched full article bodies, so the commentary goes beyond RSS snippets.
heroTitleZh: OpenAI公布指令层级、提示注入
heroTitleEn: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs

themes.themeZh: 检索、多模态与记忆系统

featuredItems.titleZh: OpenAI公布指令层级、提示注入
featuredItems.titleEn: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
featuredItems.summaryZh: OpenAI公布了一项围绕指令层级、提示注入的研究型更新，目标是让模型在复杂提示冲突里更可控。 正文里最值得记下的信号是：IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving 指令层级, 安全 steerability, and resistance to 提示注入 attacks…
featuredItems.summaryEn: OpenAI published a research-driven update around instruction hierarchy and prompt injection, aimed at making models more controllable under conflicting instructions. The strongest signal in the article is: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 这类进展会直接影响模型在真实产品里能否稳定遵循高优先级指令，是企业接入、Agent 可控性和高风险场景落地的基础。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: This kind of progress changes whether frontier models can obey higher-priority instructions reliably in production, which directly affects enterprise adoption, controllable agents, and high-risk deployments.

featuredItems.titleZh: OpenAI发布交互式可视化讲解、数学与科学
featuredItems.titleEn: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT

featuredItems.summaryEn: OpenAI rolled out a new move around interactive visual explanations and math and science, extending its push on turning capability into repeatable product behavior. The strongest signal in the article is: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 当能力真正进入用户日常动作时，竞争会从模型分数转向使用深度、留存、交互设计和默认入口。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: Once capability lands inside everyday user actions, competition shifts from raw model scores to depth of use, retention, interaction design, and default entry points.

featuredItems.summaryZh: Hugging Face把嵌入模型、多模态进一步推进到产品和开发者工作流里，重点放在提升非结构化信息进入同一检索空间的能力。 正文里最值得记下的信号是：Enterprise + Article Published March 10, 2026 - A collaborative approach to scaling trustworthy AI systems and agents…
featuredItems.summaryEn: Hugging Face pushed embedding model and multimodal deeper into product and developer workflows, with a clear emphasis on bringing more unstructured data into the same retrieval space. The strongest signal in the article is: Enterprise + Article Published March 10, 2026 - A collaborative approach to scaling trustworthy AI systems and agents. Why it matters…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 这类底层能力决定搜索、推荐、知识库和多模态检索系统的可用性，很多 AI 产品体验的上限取决于这里。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: These lower-layer capabilities determine the quality ceiling for search, recommendations, knowledge systems, and multimodal retrieval—many AI products become meaningfully better or worse here.
